description: Workflow to fetch and plot xView1 images for a specific area and date.
label: Geospatial Image Plotting Workflow

participants.description: Agent to query dataset images based on AOI coordinates and time.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_query_agent
config.description: Fetches images from the xView1 dataset based on specified coordinates and time.
config.system_message: You will query the dataset for images in Dar es-Salam, Tanzania from Summer 2017.

participants.description: Agent to process and plot the fetched images.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: map_plotting_agent
config.description: Plots the fetched images on the map and visualizes them appropriately.
config.system_message: You will plot the fetched images on the map after receiving them.
